creator: taguchi@tohoku.iij.ad.jp
text:
${PORTSDIR}/japanese has tcl76/Tk42. but ${PORTSDIR}/{lang|x11}, do NOT
contain them.
So I created them.

They are based on ${PORTSDIR}/japanese/{tcl76/tk42}, but, offcause,
They do NOT conflict Japanized one.

Fix: 

I've put it to:
ftp://ports.jp.freebsd.org/pub/incoming/ports-jp/tcl76-970311.tar.gz
ftp://ports.jp.freebsd.org/pub/incoming/ports-jp/tk42-970311.tar.gz

Thanks.
